---
title: Live Demos
description: Interactive demos for every domain preset and the new modular packages — try them all with real data.
---

# Live Demos

Each demo below is a fully interactive scheduler with real domain data. You can drag blocks, right-click for actions, resize shifts, switch views, and explore every feature.

## New — Modular packages

<div className="grid sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4 not-prose mt-4 mb-8">

  <a href="/demos/packages" target="_blank"
    className="group block rounded-xl border border-violet-500/30 bg-violet-500/5 p-5 hover:bg-violet-500/10 hover:border-violet-500/50 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5">
    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
      <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded-full bg-violet-500 shrink-0" />
      <span className="font-semibold text-foreground">Modular Packages</span>
      <span className="ml-auto rounded-full bg-violet-500/15 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-violet-700 dark:text-violet-400">New</span>
    </div>
    <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Live demo + package map for all 22 <code>@shadcn-scheduler/*</code> packages. See the package tree, usage snippets, and a running Month/Year/List view.</p>
    <span className="mt-3 inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-primary group-hover:gap-2 transition-all">Open demo →</span>
  </a>

  <a href="/demos/packages-raw" target="_blank"
    className="group block rounded-xl border border-blue-500/30 bg-blue-500/5 p-5 hover:bg-blue-500/10 hover:border-blue-500/50 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5">
    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
      <div className="h-3 w-3 rounded-full bg-blue-500 shrink-0" />
      <span className="font-semibold text-foreground">Individual Packages</span>
      <span className="ml-auto rounded-full bg-blue-500/15 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-400">New</span>
    </div>
    <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground"><code>SchedulerProvider</code> + <code>MonthView / YearView / ListView</code> imported separately — no fat bundle. Shows the source snippet for the active view.</p>
    <span className="mt-3 inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-primary group-hover:gap-2 transition-all">Open demo →</span>
  </a>

</div>

## Domain presets
